title: SQL Sales Dashboard
description: Build an interactive dashboard for regional sales trends and KPIs.
learning_objectives: Clean sales data\nDesign KPI metrics\nCreate dashboard views
resources: Pandas Docs | https://pandas.pydata.org/docs/\nPower BI Docs | https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/
task_checklist:
Load and clean CSV data
Compute KPI metrics
Build dashboard pages
Write insight summary
detailed_roadmap:
Week 1: Data prep
Week 2: KPI design
Week 3: Dashboard build
Week 4: Final report

title: DevOps Deployment Pipeline
description: Create CI/CD for a web app with tests and deployment automation.
learning_objectives: Set up build pipeline\nAdd test stage\nConfigure deployment stage
resources: GitHub Actions Docs | https://docs.github.com/actions\nDocker Docs | https://docs.docker.com/
task_checklist:
Create Dockerfile
Add CI workflow
Add CD workflow
Run smoke tests
detailed_roadmap: Sprint 1: Containerization\nSprint 2: CI pipeline\nSprint 3: CD rollout
premium_hints: Use environment protection rules\nAdd rollback strategy

title: Threat Hunting Log Analyzer
description: Analyze auth and network logs to identify suspicious behavior patterns.
learning_objectives: Parse multi-source logs\nWrite detection rules\nTune false positives
task_checklist: Ingest sample logs\nWrite 5 detection rules\nEvaluate precision and recall
detailed_roadmap: Phase 1: Log ingestion\nPhase 2: Rule development\nPhase 3: Tuning and report
premium_hints: Correlate across identity and endpoint events\nTrack detection coverage
